title: Order of Yun-Yuuzhan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Order of Yun-Yuuzhan''' was the cult of [[Yun-Yuuzhan]], the Creator God of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The Order was one of the more powerful sects among the [[Priest caste]], despite the fact that the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the Yuuzhan Vong was the final authority in interpreting the will of Yun-Yuuzhan.

In the [[klekket]] following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Priest/Legends|Priest]] [[Takhaff Uul]], along with other members of the Order and [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] of [[Domain Dal]], organized a conspiracy to control [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] by sabotaging his [[radank]] claw implant. Their initial goal was to have a planet converted into a giant temple for Yun-Yuuzhan. Lah, however, soon realized the conspiracy, and killed several of the priests.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''
